citation_tightness.note: The limitations section discusses the corpus composition without a citation, and the bibliography only includes one source [1], which may not fully support all claims in the text.

completeness.note: The report addresses primary trials (ARISTOTLE, ROCKET AF), regulatory status, and safety, with the completeness checklist indicating all 6 topics are covered.

flow.note: The structure follows a logical progression (efficacy -> limitations -> methods), but the placement of the methods section after limitations slightly disrupts the context-mechanism-evidence flow.

hedging_appropriateness.note: The prose appropriately acknowledges different treatment options (DOACs vs. warfarin) without overconfidence or unwarranted certainty.

tone_consistency.note: The tone remains evidence-grounded, avoiding promotional language and focusing on clinical findings and methodological details.
